message_timeline.local_command_text: !newAction("Build the blueprint structure at coordinates around x -348 to -339, y 64 to 68, z 246 to 255. First compare the blueprint requirements to inventory. Use available gold_block, quartz_block, and quartz_pillar. Collect nearby stone/granite/diorite/andesite by mining if needed, craft polished_granite, polished_diorite, polished_andesite, and stone_bricks as needed, then place every required block at its exact coordinate for levels 0 through 4. If glowstone is unavailable, skip only glowstone and continue all other blocks, then report remaining missing blocks.")

!newAction("Build the full blueprint structure at the listed coordinates. Step 1: calculate all required materials from blueprint: polished_granite 1, gold_block 26, stone_bricks 43, polished_andesite 35, quartz_block 17, stone 22, polished_diorite 22, quartz_pillar 3, glowstone 3. Step 2: use current inventory first: stone_bricks 28, stone 17, glowstone 3. Step 3: gather or craft missing materials as needed: mine stone/granite/andesite/diorite nearby and smelt/craft polished variants and stone bricks; obtain quartz blocks/pillars, gold blocks, and extra glowstone if accessible, otherwise coordinate with available resources. Step 4: clear short grass and any obstructing blocks in footprint from X -348 to -339, Y 64 to 68, Z 246 to 255, preserving safe ground. Step 5: place blocks exactly by level. Level 0 Y64: (-348,64,246) polished_granite; Z247 X -347 gold_block, -346 stone_bricks, -345 polished_andesite, -344 gold_block, -343 quartz_block, -342 polished_andesite, -341 gold_block, -…

!newAction("Continue the blueprint. Get/craft missing stone materials: mine nearby stone, andesite, diorite, granite; smelt cobblestone to stone if needed; craft stone_bricks from stone and polished_andesite/polished_diorite/polished_granite from their raw stones. Then place all remaining blueprint fixes exactly. Also place remaining gold_block, quartz_block, and quartz_pillar from inventory. Skip glowstone only if none is obtainable nearby.")
